featured.title: Modi’s Mega Coimbatore Roadshow Sets the Tone for NDA Across Kongu Belt
featured.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi led a 6-km roadshow across Coimbatore today, drawing the largest NDA crowds in a decade as the western belt heads to polls on April 23.

sideNews.title: Vijay’s TVK Rally in Erode Draws 1.2 Lakh First-Time Voters
sideNews.summary: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam chief Vijay’s Erode East roadshow signalled a sharp three-way contest, with first-time voters dominating the turnout.

sideNews.title: Salem Signs €456-Million 24x7 Water Supply Concession
sideNews.summary: Salem Corporation finalised a 25-year water-supply pact with a European utility major, promising round-the-clock pressurised supply to a million residents.

sideNews.title: Tiruppur Knitwear Exports Poised to Double After India-US Trade Deal
sideNews.summary: The Tiruppur Exporters’ Association projects exports may double in 3-5 years and add five lakh new jobs following tariff reductions.

gridNews.title: Traffic Curbs Tighten as Campaign Rallies Peak in Coimbatore
gridNews.summary: Coimbatore city police imposed sweeping traffic diversions across Avinashi Road and Trichy Road as final-phase campaign rallies cause unprecedented congestion.

gridNews.title: Home-Voting Begins for Elderly Across All Eight Kongu Districts
gridNews.summary: Polling teams kicked off the ECI Vote-from-Home initiative for senior citizens above 85 and persons with disabilities across the entire Kongu belt.

gridNews.title: Mettur Reservoir at 45% Storage; Karur & Erode Farmers on Edge
gridNews.summary: Stanley Reservoir’s low storage has triggered urgent calls from delta-fringe farmer collectives for a calibrated Kuruvai-season water release.

gridNews.title: Heatwave Pushes Erode Mercury to 41°C; No Relief Forecast
gridNews.summary: Erode recorded its hottest day of the season at 41.2°C, with farmers urging uninterrupted diesel supply for irrigation pumps.
